hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -e .stop_hook_active >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; LAST_COMMIT_TIME=$(git log -1 --format=%ct HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); check_file() { local FILE="$1"; local NUDGE="$2"; [ -f "$FILE" ] || return 0; local MTIME=$(stat -c %Y "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$LAST_COMMIT_TIME" -gt "$MTIME" ]; then jq -n --arg r "$NUDGE" '{decision:"block",reason:$r}'; exit 0; fi; }; check_file "research/Order-Intake-Sprint-Status.md" "research/Order-Intake-Sprint-Status.md is stale relative to git HEAD. Run git log --oneline since the status file last changed, update the status table + one-line summary + Built/Missing inventories to reflect new commits, then stop."; check_file "Glacis-Order-Intake.md" "Glacis-Order-Intake.md is stale relative to git HEAD. Run git log --oneline since the file last changed, re-tag any capabilities whose MVP status flipped (e.g. [MVP \u26a0] \u2192 [MVP \u2713] when a Track landed), update the phase roadmap if Post-MVP items closed, then stop."
